detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MONEY_BOX.Collect(uint256) (MONEY_BOX.sol#97-123):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.call.value(_am)() (MONEY_BOX.sol#111)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- acc.balance -= _am (MONEY_BOX.sol#115)
	MONEY_BOX.Acc (MONEY_BOX.sol#21) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MONEY_BOX.Acc (MONEY_BOX.sol#21)
	- MONEY_BOX.Collect(uint256) (MONEY_BOX.sol#97-123)
	- MONEY_BOX.Put(uint256) (MONEY_BOX.sol#77-93)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [MONEY_BOX.Collect(uint256)](MONEY_BOX.sol#L97-L123):
	External calls:
	- [msg.sender.call.value(_am)()](MONEY_BOX.sol#L111)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [acc.balance -= _am](MONEY_BOX.sol#L115)
	[MONEY_BOX.Acc](MONEY_BOX.sol#L21) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [MONEY_BOX.Acc](MONEY_BOX.sol#L21)
	- [MONEY_BOX.Collect(uint256)](MONEY_BOX.sol#L97-L123)
	- [MONEY_BOX.Put(uint256)](MONEY_BOX.sol#L77-L93)

detectors.description:
MONEY_BOX.Collect(uint256) (MONEY_BOX.sol#97-123) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- acc.balance >= MinSum && acc.balance >= _am && now > acc.unlockTime (MONEY_BOX.sol#107)
